ddls:
CREATE TABLE "registers" (
  "register_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each register */,
  "register_name" TEXT /* Name of the register */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the register's purpose and functionality */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the register belongs to */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the register in the memory */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the register in bits */,
  "access_control" TEXT /* Role-based access control for the register */,
  "dependency_count" INTEGER /* Number of dependencies this register has */,
  "interaction_count" INTEGER /* Number of interactions this register has */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the register was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the register was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("register_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registers_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bit_fields" (
  "bit_field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bit field */,
  "register_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the register the bit field belongs to */,
  "bit_range" TEXT /* Bit range of the bit field (e.g., 7:4) */,
  "reset_value" TEXT /* Reset value of the bit field */,
  "read_write" TEXT /* Read/write permission of the bit field (R, W, or RW) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bit field's purpose and functionality */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the bit field in bits */,
  "access_control" TEXT /* Role-based access control for the bit field */,
  "dependency_count" INTEGER /* Number of dependencies this bit field has */,
  "interaction_count" INTEGER /* Number of interactions this bit field has */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the bit field was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the bit field was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bit_field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bit_fields_register_id FOREIGN KEY ("register_id") REFERENCES registers ("register_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "team_size" INTEGER /* Number of team members working on the project */,
  "lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project lead */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_lead_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "register_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change event */,
  "register_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the register that was changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the register before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the register after the change */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Status of the change approval */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_register_changes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_register_changes_register_id FOREIGN KEY ("register_id") REFERENCES registers ("register_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, developer, admin) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the user is associated with */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's manager */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "register_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "register_id" INTEGER /* ID of the register being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the register */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the register was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* ID of the session during which the access occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_register_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_register_access_register_id FOREIGN KEY ("register_id") REFERENCES registers ("register_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "register_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "source_register_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source register that depends on or interacts with another register */,
  "target_register_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target register that the source register depends on or interacts with */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., read, write, update) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dependency or interaction */,
  "trigger_condition" TEXT /* Condition that triggers the dependency */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the dependency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dependency was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dependency was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_register_dependencies_source_register_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_register_id") REFERENCES registers ("register_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_register_dependencies_target_register_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_register_id") REFERENCES registers ("register_id")
)
